name: Saudization (Nitaqat) — Workforce Localisation
standard: Nitaqat Programme — Ministry of Human Resources & Social Development (HRSD / MHRSD)
regulator: Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development (HRSD)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that enforce the Nitaqat workforce-localisation programme on every tender and subcontractor record. Construction firms with >9 employees must hold at least a Yellow band; only Platinum / Green-High / Green-Medium / Green-Low bands can sponsor new visas, win government tenders, or be Aramco-approved. Rules check that each subcontractor row discloses its current Nitaqat band, that the Saudi workforce percentage matches the required band threshold for the firm size + activity (construction has its own table), and that any firm awarded a public-sector tender is at Green-Medium or above.
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق لإنفاذ برنامج نطاقات لتوطين القوى العاملة — التحقق من النطاق الحالي للمقاول، ونسبة العمالة السعودية، والأهلية للمناقصات الحكومية.
